headline: Hershey (HSY) Stock Could Be Undervalued On Cash Flow But Overvalued On Earnings
summary: Hershey stock is trading around US$171.65 after a mixed few years, and investors are facing a clear tension as the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate points to meaningful upside, while traditional market multiples suggest the shares already look expensive. Against a backdrop of a 21.5% decline over the past three years, the question is how to weigh that split in the valuation signals. Hershey’s share price has declined 21.5% over the past three years, which may have reset...
